name: Left Lateral Cut – Ideal Form
description: Ideal biomechanical left lateral cut sequence. Athlete begins in athletic ready stance, performs a controlled weight shift left with knee bend to ~90 degrees, plants left foot with good ankle dorsiflexion, knees tracking over toes (no valgus), torso upright (<5° lean), hips level throughout, then explosively cuts right. 30 frames over 2.0 seconds with slightly varied timing profile.
